ads.description: Description: Innodigym all-in-one smart home gym — a full-body workout that slides under your bed when you're done. This compact training board replaces a rack of weights with digital resistance. Stand on the platform, clip in the handles, and do rows, squats, curls, presses, deadlifts, and more. Total gym workout in a 3-foot footprint. INCLUDED: • Innodigym smart training platform • 2 handles with straps and carabiner clips • Power cord • Everything you need to start training day one WHY YOU'LL LIKE IT: • Adjustable digital resistance — grows with you from beginner to advanced • Whisper quiet, no clanking plates • Stores flat — closet, under the bed, behind a couch • No assembly, plug in and go Good used condition — normal light wear, works perfectly. From a clean, smoke-free home gym. Retails $599–$799 new. Asking $299. Pickup in Marietta (30066). Cash or Venmo. First come, first served — these don't last long at this price.

ads.author: Alex Caughman
ads.title: Bally Hi-Deal EM Pinball Machine
ads.description: This is a working project that I do not have the time or energy to properly restore. The game plays in both 3 and 5 ball configuration, depending on your preference. Every target, rollover, switch, saucer etc register and score as they should. The backglass is near perfect. The lamps in the backbox and on the coin door work, however the lamps on the playfield do not. The reels are dirty and will need to be cleaned, as the 10,000 point reel will start skipping once you get to 79k. They will advance during the reset sequence. The game is generally dirty and needs to be shopped. Game is located in Woodstock, GA. I will work with your shipper if necessary.
